CustomField.formula:
OR( ISPICKVAL(Type__c ,'Revenue'), ISPICKVAL(Type__c ,'Customer Returns / Refunds'), ISPICKVAL(Type__c ,'Partner Referral Fee'), ISPICKVAL(Type__c ,'Non-Payment'), AND( ISPICKVAL(Type__c ,'Incorrect Order/Mis-quote'), Impacts_Commission__c = True ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Type__c ,'Change in Booking Policy / De-Risk Decision'), Impacts_Commission__c = True ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Type__c ,'Unpaid Replacement Debooking'), Impacts_Commission__c = True )
)
CustomField.label: Commission Impact
